title: PlanetScale Vitess (MySQL)
description: Track PlanetScale Vitess query rate, latency, pools, MySQL internals, replication lag, VTOrc, storage, and pod resources. Use branch, keyspace, and tablet type filters.

var_branch.name: branch
var_branch.description: Filter panels by PlanetScale database branch (planetscale_database_branch_id).

var_keyspace.name: keyspace
var_keyspace.description: Filter vttablet and MySQL panels by Vitess keyspace (planetscale_keyspace).

var_tablet_type.name: tablet_type
var_tablet_type.description: Filter vttablet and MySQL panels by tablet type, such as primary, replica, or rdonly (planetscale_tablet_type).

widgets.title: vtgate Query Rate
widgets.description: Queries per second through vtgate.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: vtgate Latency p99
widgets.description: p99 query execution time through vtgate. Confirm the unit after ingest.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: Buffer Pool Hit %
widgets.description: InnoDB buffer pool hit ratio from (1 - reads / read_requests) * 100. Low values mean disk reads increased.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Replica Lag
widgets.description: Worst MySQL replication lag across selected tablets.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace

widgets.title: Slow Queries /s
widgets.description: Slow queries per second.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Storage Used
widgets.description: Used vttablet volume percentage from (capacity - available) / capacity.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.description: Queries per second through vtgate by operation type.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: vtgate Query Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
widgets.description: Query execution time distribution through vtgate.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: vtgate Average Query Latency
widgets.description: Mean vtgate query execution time from rate(duration.sum) / rate(duration.count).

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: vtgate Rows Returned / Affected
widgets.description: Rows returned and affected per second through vtgate.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: Tablet Query Rate by Tablet Type
widgets.description: Queries per second by vttablet tablet type.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Tablet Query Latency p99 by Keyspace
widgets.description: p99 tablet query execution time by keyspace.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Tablet Rows Read / Returned / Affected
widgets.description: Rows read, returned, and affected per second at the tablet.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.description: Slow queries per second by keyspace.

widgets.description: vttablet connection pool usage compared with capacity.

widgets.title: Pool Waits /s
widgets.description: Waits per second for free connection and transaction pool slots. Sustained non-zero values indicate pool saturation.

planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.description: vttablet stream connection pool usage compared with capacity.

widgets.description: vttablet found-rows pool usage compared with capacity.

widgets.description: MySQL threads running queries.

widgets.title: InnoDB Row Operations /s
widgets.description: InnoDB row operations per second by operation type.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: InnoDB Row Lock Waits /s
widgets.description: InnoDB row lock waits per second and lock wait time accrued per second.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: MySQL Network I/O
widgets.description: MySQL bytes sent and received per second.

planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: InnoDB Buffer Pool Hit %
widgets.description: Buffer pool hit ratio from (1 - rate(reads) / rate(read_requests)) * 100. Sustained dips point to a working set larger than the buffer pool.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Replica Lag by Shard
widgets.description: MySQL replication lag by shard, in seconds.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace

widgets.title: MySQL Threads Connected vs Max
widgets.description: Open MySQL connections compared with max_connections.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: MySQL Connection Attempts /s
widgets.description: New MySQL connection attempts per second by tablet type.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Temp Tables Created /s
widgets.description: Internal temp tables created per second and temp tables spilled to disk. High disk-table rates point to expensive sorts or joins.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Table Locks /s
widgets.description: Table locks acquired without waiting compared with locks that waited.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: InnoDB Buffer Pool I/O /s
widgets.description: Logical buffer pool reads compared with reads that reached disk.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Connection Utilization % by Pod
widgets.description: Per-pod MySQL connection utilization from threads_connected / max_connections * 100. Use it to find a saturated tablet hidden by fleet totals.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: VTOrc Detected Problems
widgets.description: Current VTOrc problem count. Non-zero values indicate replication or topology issues.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: VTOrc Recoveries /s
widgets.description: Successful and failed VTOrc recovery attempts per second by recovery type.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch
planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.title: Tablet Serving Status
widgets.description: vttablet serving status by shard and tablet type. Value 1 means serving.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch AND planetscale_keyspace IN $keyspace AND planetscale_tablet_type IN $tablet_type

widgets.title: Pods by Status Phase
widgets.description: Pod count by Kubernetes status phase. Check non-zero Pending or Failed pods.

filter.expression: planetscale_database_branch_id IN $branch

widgets.description: Used vttablet volume percentage from (capacity - available) / capacity * 100.
